zh.lifeSummary: 當Freiherr Janos von Hirscher於1132年出生在德國時，他的父親Freiherr Hermann III von Hirscher30歲，母親Katerina of Hirscher-Sargans22歲。他和Kurski Princess Ewrosinija至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1184年享年52歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 拉文斯包格波德格希爾黑。

zh-hans.Hirscher, Bodnegg, Ravensburg, Baden-Wür: 德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 拉文斯包格波德格希爾黑

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Freiherr Janos von Hirscher于1132年出生在德国时，他的父亲Freiherr Hermann III von Hirscher30岁，母亲Katerina of Hirscher-Sargans22岁。他和Kurski Princess Ewrosinija至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1184年享年52岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 拉文斯包格波德格希爾黑。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Hirscher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Henri.  Jewish Avi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic) and German: variant of   Herschel  .

variants.name: Herschel
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a pet form of   Hirsch  . This surname is also found in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Janos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hungarian (János): from the personal name János, from Latin Johannes (see John ).

Slovak (Jánoš, also Janoš), Czech (Janoš, also Jánoš), and Polish: derivative of the personal name Jan (Slovak Ján) ‘John’ or, in some cases, from a Slavicized form of the Hungarian cognate János (see above). In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the Polish variant Janosz.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: Janosik
meanings: Slovak (Jánošík, also Janošík, Jánošik) and Czech (Janošík); Polish: from a pet form of the personal names Jánoš, Janoš, or Janos , derivatives of Jan (Slovak Ján) ‘John’.

variants.name: Janosko
meanings: Slovak (Janoško, also Jánoško): from a pet form of the personal name Jánoš or Janoš (see Janos ), a derivative of Ján (see Jan ).

variants.name: Janoski
meanings: habitational name for someone from Janoszyce in Masovian Voivodeship.
from a derivative of the personal name Janosz (see Janos ).

en.lifeSummary: When Freiherr Janos von Hirscher was born in 1132, in Germany, his father, Freiherr Hermann III von Hirscher, was 30 and his mother, Katerina of Hirscher-Sargans, was 22. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Kurski Princess Ewrosinija. He died in 1184, at the age of 52, and was buried in Hirscher, Bodnegg, Ravensburg, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Freiherr Janos von Hirscher est né en 1132, à Allemagne, son père, Freiherr Hermann III von Hirscher, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Katerina of Hirscher-Sargans, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Kurski Princess Ewrosinija. Il est décédé en 1184, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Hirscher, Bodnegg, Landkreis Ravensburg, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Freiherr Janos von Hirscher 1132 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Freiherr Hermann III von Hirscher 30 und seine Mutter Katerina of Hirscher-Sargans 22. Er hatte mit Kurski Princess Ewrosinija mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1184 im Alter von 52 Jahren und wurde in Hirscher, Bodnegg, Landkreis Ravensburg, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Freiherr Janos von Hirscher è nato il nel 1132 nel Germania, il suo padre, Freiherr Hermann III von Hirscher, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Katerina of Hirscher-Sargans, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Kurski Princess Ewrosinija. Morì nel 1184, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Hirscher, Bodnegg, Landkreis Ravensburg, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Freiherr Janos von Hirscherが1132年にドイツで生まれた時，父Freiherr Hermann III von Hirscherは30歳，母Katerina of Hirscher-Sargansは22歳であった。彼はKurski Princess Ewrosinijaとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1184年に52歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス ラベンスブルグボドネググヒルッシャーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Freiherr Janos von Hirscher(이)가 1132년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Freiherr Hermann III von Hirscher(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Katerina of Hirscher-Sargans(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Kurski Princess Ewrosinija(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1184년 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 레이븐스버그 보드네그 허슈어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Freiherr Janos von Hirscher nasceu em 1132, em Alemanha, seu pai, Freiherr Hermann III von Hirscher, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Katerina of Hirscher-Sargans, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Kurski Princess Ewrosinija. Ele faleceu em 1184, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Hirscher, Bodnegg, Landkreis Ravensburg, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Freiherr Janos von Hirscher родился в 1132 г. в местности Германия, его отцу по имени Freiherr Hermann III von Hirscher было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Katerina of Hirscher-Sargans, 22. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Kurski Princess Ewrosinija. Он умер в 1184 г. в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности хирщир, боднег, ландкрис равенсбург, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Kurski Princess Ewrosinija. Murió en 1184, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Hirscher, Bodnegg, Landkreis Ravensburg, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
